conversation.body: Then it is held. We will keep the morning quiet for you.

parsed_intents.detail: Yes — approve the Saturday morning plan.

profile.history_summary: Mrs. Liu has approved the Saturday-morning arrangement. Tasks now go live across four staff teams.

availability.service: Garden — main lawn and water feature

property.seasonal_context: Late-spring coastal fog through 10am; oak-shadow garden cool and quiet at dawn.

cultural_resources.label: Aged pu-erh in stock
cultural_resources.detail: 2010 cooked pu-erh selected for Saturday service.

cultural.recommendation: The plan is held. The terrace will be set in the fog; the tea will arrive at 8:15; the garden will be empty for you afterward.
cultural.cultural_reasoning: Consent given. The cultural reading carries over from the prior turn — Water phase, return-not-discover, Hangzhou ↔ Sand Hill fog echo. The Companion's only remaining job is to step back; the place will keep the morning quiet for them.
cultural.alternative_if_context_shifts: If they sleep through 8:15, the pot is replaced with a fresh one at 08:45 with no follow-up message.
cultural.emotional_arc_note: Step back. The plan is the gift; the silence after is the rest of the gift.
avoidance_applied: no upsell of the Madera Sunday hold

composition.final_recommendation: Saturday plan goes LIVE: pu-erh on R412 terrace at 08:15, terrace doors open 08:00, garden water feature confirmed 07:30, Sun PM Madera private terrace held. Companion sends one short acknowledgement only.
composition.guest_facing_body: Then it is held. We will keep the morning quiet for you.
composition.gate_notes: Consent given. The right next move is the smallest acknowledgement, not a recap.

routed_tasks.task: LIVE: aged pu-erh service for two on R412 private terrace at 08:15. Confirmed by guest.
routed_tasks.cultural_context: Pour, set, leave. No conversation unless invited.

routed_tasks.task: LIVE: open R412 terrace doors at 08:00; fog heater on; tea linen + bay laurel sprig.
LIVE: Saturday AM brief includes R412 anniversary couple, garden-quiet preferred. Madera Sun PM private terrace confirmed held.
routed_tasks.cultural_context: Mandarin-preferred. Mei Tanaka routed if available.

routed_tasks.task: LIVE: water feature cleaned and running by 07:30; path checked for fog-slick.
routed_tasks.cultural_context: Guest may walk 8:45–9:00. Empty garden is the brief.
